expectations.evidence: Contains 'npm install -g agent-pulse', 'agent-pulse init', and 'agent-pulse server start' in Step 1
Full AgentPulseCallbackHandler class extending BaseCallbackHandler with on_tool_start, on_tool_end, on_tool_error
on_tool_start sends 'lock', on_tool_end/on_tool_error sends 'unlock' with exit codes
Explains 'stale (stuck longer than expected) or dead (no heartbeat at all)' and links to agent-pulse runs --status stale
Shows callbacks=[pulse_handler] on both ChatOpenAI and AgentExecutor, with executor.invoke() call
